calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-13-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

JUDICIAL MEDIATION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SVETLANA M. SHIRINOVA, ESQ. (Tel: 415-947-0703) appearing with/for plaintiff LYUBOV LVOVSKAYA (assisted by OLENA SUKHOVA as a Russian-language interpreter);
Atty. MARC BRAINICH, ESQ. of Wendel Rosen LLP (510-834-6600) present for defendant Regents of University of California (Also Present: MARGARET SCHROEDER as representative from Regents of University of California);
Atty. IAN P. WILSON, ESQ. of Ericksen Arbuthnot (Tel: 408-286-0880) appearing for defendants Traffic Management, Inc., City and County of San Francisco, Pacific Gas and Electric Company, and Alvah Contractors, Inc.

The Court, counsel for parties, and parties conduct a judicial mediation session. The parties reach a settlement agreement the terms of which the parties indicate they understand and agree to. The parties will memorialize the terms of the settlement agreement in writing. The parties anticipate the terms of the settlement agreement will be completed by June 1, 2020. The Court retains jurisdiction to enforce the terms of the settlement. Plaintiff's counsel anticipates filing a Notice of Conditional Settlement within one week.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (613/AYSC)
